title: Japanese Eva manga what are all the limited editions
display_title: Japanese Eva manga what are all the limited editions
wikitext:
[]: Japanese Eva manga - what are all the limited editions?             Quote Post by deeRez » Mon Nov 24, 2014 12:58 pm Now that the Sadamoto Eva manga series is over, what are all the special editions of the manga? My search results keep getting interrupted by the English special editions. So far I got: Volume 7 - Rei Christmas Volume 7 - Asuka Christmas Volume 9 Volume 13 (my favorite) Volume 14 (additional material was underwhelming) + the manga guide Are those it? Or were there any other special editions? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Nov 24, 2014 3:38 pm I have those as well but would like to know if I missed something. My Vol. 7 and 9 pickups were purely by chance.
